standards.description: Describe the structure and function of plant and animal organ systems
Explain how organisms obtain and use energy from food
Describe life cycles of plants and animals including metamorphosis
Describe the relationship between organisms in an ecosystem including food chains and food webs
Explain how organisms are adapted to their environment
Identify human impacts on ecosystems and ways to protect the environment
Classify materials as solids, liquids, or gases based on their properties
Describe physical changes including dissolving, melting, and evaporation
Explain the concept of density and how it relates to sinking and floating
Identify simple machines and explain how they make work easier
Describe how forces affect the motion of objects
Explain different forms of energy including heat, light, sound, and electrical energy
Describe how energy can be transformed from one form to another
Identify renewable and non-renewable energy sources
Describe the structure of the solar system including the Sun, planets, and moons
Explain the cause of day and night and the seasons
Identify natural resources and explain the importance of conservation
Use the scientific method to design and conduct simple investigations
Collect, organize, and interpret data using tables, charts, and graphs
Communicate scientific findings using appropriate vocabulary and representations
